testimonials.title: Trusted by operators and investors worldwide

items.quote: Vikingo replaced three legacy systems. Revenue per machine increased 34% in six months.
items.author: Carlos Gonzalez

items.quote: Deploying across 12 countries was seamless. SumUp per country and multi-currency just works.
items.author: Sofia L.

items.quote: AI pricing and real-time telemetry cut route costs 28%. True enterprise infrastructure.
items.author: James K.

items.a: Vikingo is a proprietary fintech + IoT platform — the operating system for autonomous commerce. Payments, telemetry, inventory, AI pricing, ERP integrations, and global operations in one infrastructure.

items.q: In which countries can I operate?
items.a: Vikingo operates internationally wherever SumUp processes payments in each country, with multi-currency support and rapid multinational onboarding.
Our infrastructure aligns with PCI PTS V4.0, SRED, EMV Level 1 & 2, Mastercard PayPass, Visa payWave, American Express Expresspay, and Visa Ready standards.
SumUp acts as the national payment processor in each market. Vikingo orchestrates devices, telemetry, and operations while payments settle through SumUp locally.

items.q: Can I integrate ERP and WhatsApp?
items.a: Yes. Enterprise plans include ERP integrations, WhatsApp alerts, and custom API access.

careers.title: Join Vikingo
careers.intro1: At Vikingo we are building a new generation of intelligent payment solutions for global markets. Our focus combines financial technology, automation, artificial intelligence, IoT, and digital experiences designed to operate across multiple countries.
careers.intro2: We are assembling a high-caliber team to accelerate our international growth. We seek people with an innovative mindset, execution ability, and a genuine drive to build technology with impact.
careers.recruitingTitle: We are recruiting talent in areas such as:
careers.whatWeLookForIntro: People who want to stand out, propose ideas, lead projects, and build scalable solutions. We especially value:
values: Ability to work in dynamic, fast-growth environments
careers.advantageTitle: We want to know your competitive advantage
careers.advantageIntro: When applying, tell us what makes you different. For example:
examples: Experience in fintech, payments, AI, cloud, or automation
understand: What can you contribute that other candidates cannot?
careers.techIntro: We are interested in talent with experience in technologies such as:
careers.buildText: If you want to be part of a globally minded fintech, work on challenging projects, and help create technology that can scale internationally, we want to meet you.

form.name: Full name
form.differentiator: What makes you different? What can you contribute that others cannot?

careers.formSuccess: Thank you for applying! We will review your profile and contact you soon.
careers.closing1: Great companies start with great teams.
careers.closing2: This could be the beginning of something huge.
